# Transcrição: The_Best_Ways_to_Leverage_ChatGPT_and_AI

## [00:00 - 01:28]

Ever since chat GPT came out and made this big splash, I've been thinking about, you know, what are the ways that I could leverage this technology? For me, I think like chat GPT first of all, is like really good for generating ideas for topics, just ideas, right? It's not like, oh, you told me these 10 things, I'm going to write about these 10 things, just idea generation. But, you know, in terms of like, OK, how can they use it so I can provide more value? Well, what's the biggest obstacle? My website was started 12 years ago. There's a lot of content there. And I think the biggest challenge is people don't realize how much content's there. OK, maybe they do know how they find the answer that they're looking for. And there is, you know, a messenger widget on there so they can message me and message my team and we'll give them an answer, but you're not going to get an immediate response. So what if you could get somebody an immediate response from a bot that is trained on my content and then have to be very careful? Like obviously, somebody wrote 10 years ago isn't as relevant as it is now. So I've given it like 160 or so blog posts plus a glossary of terms and an FAQ. And I think it's become really, really helpful. Not only have I found it's a really good tool for visitors, users of the site, just looking for quick answers. It's inspired me to create new content.
